disabled_touchpoints.description: List of touchpoint names that are completely disabled. If the current touchpoint is in this list, the offer screen cannot be opened (returns CAN_NOT_OPEN status).

disabled_subtouchpoints.description: List of sub-touchpoint names that are disabled. If the current sub-touchpoint is in this list, the offer screen cannot be opened (returns CAN_NOT_OPEN status).

touchpoints.description: Array of touchpoint configurations, each defining offer display rules for one or more touchpoints. When a touchpoint is requested, the system finds the matching entry (by name or names) and evaluates its info entries. If no match is found, the entry with name 'default' is used as fallback.

names.description: Alternative list of touchpoint identifiers that this configuration matches. Used alongside 'name' — if either 'name' matches or the requested touchpoint is in 'names', this touchpoint configuration is selected.

name.description: Single touchpoint identifier used to match against the requested touchpoint. A special value 'default' serves as a fallback when no other touchpoint matches.

info.description: Array of offer parameter configurations for this touchpoint. Each entry defines screens, session tracking, launch logic rules, and offer display settings. They are evaluated in order; the first entry whose launch_logic conditions pass is used.

thank_you_popup.description: Identifier for the thank-you popup to display after a successful offer interaction.

launch_logic.description: Array of launch logic rules that define conditions under which this offer can be shown. Each rule contains range checks, session limits, ad replacement flags, and user state filters. The offer is shown if any single rule's conditions are all satisfied.

should_replace_with_ad.description: When true, the offer is replaced with an interstitial ad. The offer is only shown if an interstitial ad can be displayed for the mapped touchpoint.

should_replace_with_reward_credit.description: When true, the offer is replaced with a rewarded credit ad. The offer is only shown if a rewarded ad with credits flow is available for the given touchpoint.

install_day_min.description: Minimum number of days since app installation (inclusive) required to show this offer. A value of -1 means no constraint.

editor_done_min.description: Minimum number of editor-done actions (inclusive) required to show this offer. A value of -1 means no constraint.

app_session_end.description: Maximum app session count (exclusive) for showing this offer. Checked against the total number of app sessions. A value of -1 means no upper bound.

editor_done_max.description: Maximum number of editor-done actions (exclusive) for showing this offer. A value of -1 means no upper bound.

session_limit_start.description: Minimum in-memory offer session count (inclusive) for the current touchpoint+screens combination required to show this offer. A value of -1 means no constraint.

had_subscription_package.description: List of subscription package IDs. When non-empty, the offer is shown only if the user has a purchase history entry for at least one of these packages.

user_had_subscription.description: Filter based on user's subscription history. When true, the offer is shown only if the user previously had a subscription. When false, only if the user never had a subscription. When null/absent, no filtering is applied.

should_replace_with_reward_interstitial.description: When true, the offer is replaced with a reward interstitial ad. The offer is only shown if an interstitial ad can be displayed, with the minimum show interval check skipped.

key_session_start.description: Minimum key-session count (inclusive) required to show this offer. Checked against the persisted count stored under the parent's session_key. A value of -1 means no constraint.

install_day_max.description: Maximum number of days since app installation (exclusive) for showing this offer. A value of -1 means no upper bound.

is_ai_credit.description: When present, filters the offer based on whether the user is in the AI credits flow. When true, the offer is shown only if the user is in the credits flow. When false, only if the user is not. When null/absent, no filtering is applied.

offer_screen_touchpoint.description: Touchpoint identifier override for the offer screen within this launch logic rule. Takes priority over the legacy 'offer_screen_touch_point' field.

repeat_key_session.description: Show the offer only at specific intervals of the key-session count. The offer is shown when (key_session_count + 1) % (repeat_key_session + 1) == 0. A value of -1 means no repeat constraint.

storage_min_percent.description: Minimum storage usage percentage (inclusive) required to show this offer. Checked against the user's cached storage usage percentage. A value of -1 means no constraint.

is_store_available.description: When true, the offer is shown only if Google Play Store is among the active payment services. When false, shown only if Google Play Store is not active. Defaults to true if absent.

key_session_end.description: Maximum key-session count (exclusive) for showing this offer. Checked against the persisted count stored under the parent's session_key. A value of -1 means no upper bound.

repeat_session.description: Show the offer only when the app session count is a multiple of this value (app_session_count % repeat_session == 0). A value of -1 means no repeat constraint.

offer_screen_touch_point.description: Legacy field specifying the touchpoint identifier override for the offer screen within this launch logic rule. Superseded by 'offer_screen_touchpoint' when that field is present.

restricted_packages.description: List of package and offer ID pairs. When non-empty, the offer is shown only if the user is eligible for all specified promotional offers.

package_id.description: The subscription package identifier used to check if the user is eligible for a promotional offer.

offer_id.description: The promotional offer identifier within the package, used together with package_id to verify user eligibility.

current_tier_types.description: List of subscription tier type identifiers that the user must currently be on for this offer to be shown. The value 'free' matches non-subscribed users. When empty, no tier filtering is applied.

app_session_start.description: Minimum app session count (inclusive) required to show this offer. Checked against the total number of app sessions. A value of -1 means no constraint.

daily_session_limit.description: Maximum number of times the offer can be shown per day for this touchpoint+screens combination. A value of -1 means no daily limit.

should_replace_with_reward.description: When true, the offer is replaced with a rewarded ad. The offer is only shown if a rewarded ad is available for the given touchpoint.

skip_offer_during_cooldown.description: When true, the offer is skipped if the one-day-pass cooldown period has not yet passed (default cooldown is 30 days). When false or absent, the cooldown check is not applied.

session_limit_end.description: Maximum in-memory offer session count (exclusive) for the current touchpoint+screens combination. A value of -1 means no upper bound.

storage_max_percent.description: Maximum storage usage percentage (exclusive) for showing this offer. Checked against the user's cached storage usage percentage. A value of -1 means no upper bound.

offer_variant.description: Identifier for the offer variant, used to differentiate between different visual or functional variations of the offer screen.

screens.description: List of screen identifiers associated with this offer configuration. Used together with the touchpoint name to form a composite key for tracking session counts (e.g. 'touchpoint.screen1.screen2').

offer_screen_touchpoint.description: Touchpoint identifier to use for the offer screen. Takes priority over the legacy 'offer_screen_touch_point' field.

session_key.description: Key used to persist and track the number of times this specific offer has been shown across app sessions. When non-empty, the key_session_start and key_session_end range in launch_logic is checked against the count stored under this key.

is_one_time_offer.description: When true, marks this offer as a one-time purchase offer rather than a recurring subscription offer.

offer_screen_touch_point.description: Legacy field specifying the touchpoint identifier to use for the offer screen. Superseded by 'offer_screen_touchpoint' when that field is present.
